title: B@sowr #1308
definition:
Besor = "cheerful"

 1) a stream, torrent-bed, or wadi in extreme south of Judah in
    Philistia; empties into the Mediterranean Sea
nasbUsage:

 1) a stream, torrent-bed, or wadi in extreme south of Judah in
    Philistia; empties into the Mediterranean Sea

    NASB:  a stream in Pal.
